== Notes for [[Item:Q99594|Q99594]] ==

She was born before 665.

See "My Lines"

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/p106.htm#i12939 )

from Compiler: R. B. Stewart, Evans, GA

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/index.htm )
--------------------
http://www.findagrave.com/cgi-bin/fg.cgi?page=gr&GRid=52651281

RESEARCH NOTES:
Princess of Exilarchs

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per03111.htm#0

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD78C3F61EFBBFA9822EF79916C4C25
geni:6000000000701103077

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
